context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures DNS records for a full domain setup using the Namecheap Terraform provider, covering provider source/version, record syntax rules (lowercase, trailing dots), apex aliasing, email type configuration, and MX record preferences.

checklist.name: Provider source
checklist.description: The required_providers block specifies source as "namecheap/namecheap" (not another source string)

checklist.name: Provider version constraint
checklist.description: The required_providers block specifies version ">= 2.0.0" (or a compatible constraint that includes 2.x)

checklist.name: Lowercase hostnames
checklist.description: All hostname values in record blocks are lowercase (no uppercase letters in any hostname field)

checklist.name: Lowercase addresses
checklist.description: All address values in record blocks are lowercase (no uppercase letters in any address field)

checklist.name: ALIAS record for apex
checklist.description: Uses an ALIAS record type (not A or CNAME) for the apex domain (@) pointing to the CDN hostname

checklist.name: ALIAS trailing dot
checklist.description: The ALIAS record address ends with a trailing dot (e.g., "cdn-endpoint.provider.net.")

checklist.name: CNAME trailing dot
checklist.description: The www CNAME record address ends with a trailing dot (e.g., "taskflow.io.")

checklist.name: MX trailing dots
checklist.description: All MX record addresses end with a trailing dot (e.g., "mail1.taskflow.io.")

checklist.name: email_type set to MX
checklist.description: The resource includes email_type = "MX" when defining MX records

checklist.name: mx_pref on MX records
checklist.description: Both MX records include a mx_pref field with their respective priority values

checklist.name: TTL within valid range
checklist.description: Any TTL values specified in records are between 60 and 60000 (inclusive)
